message:
chore: increase deploy timer frequency to every 60 seconds (#167)

The script is a no-op when HEAD hasn't changed (exits instantly after
git fetch), so running every minute is cheap and ensures script updates
propagate within a minute of merge.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 #!/bin/bash
 # hive-deploy.sh — pull latest hive repo and sync scripts to /usr/local/bin.
-# Called by systemd timer every 5 minutes. Ensures the installed scripts
+# Called by systemd timer every 60 seconds. Ensures the installed scripts
 # always match the repo without manual SCP or copy steps.
 
 set -euo pipefail

@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@ Description=Pull and deploy hive repo every 5 minutes
 
 [Timer]
 OnBootSec=60
-OnUnitActiveSec=300
+OnUnitActiveSec=60
 Persistent=true
 
 [Install]
